title: Robust Spanish Potatoes Patatas Bravas
description: A herbal and light Spanish dish featuring jerk seasoning, whole30 friendly ingredients, and a show off presentation on a salt block, this Patatas Bravas is a unique twist on a classic recipe, with the added sweetness of candy like peppers.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the potatoes with the jerk seasoning, smoked paprika, garlic, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat and sear the potatoes until they are browned on all sides.
Transfer the potatoes to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until they are tender.
While the potatoes are roasting, heat a little more olive oil in the same skillet and saute the diced candy like peppers until they are tender.
To serve, place the roasted potatoes on a salt block and top with the sauteed peppers.
Garnish with fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro, and serve immediately.
Let the dish cool for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
